title: Apache Bigtop landscape atlas
subtitle: A public Portolan demo over a large OSS ecosystem: source repositories, package modules, deployment modules, smoke-test modules, shared dependencies, and drill-down paths.

narrative.title: Bigtop behaves like a platform portfolio, not one repository.
narrative.body: The atlas separates ecosystem integrator, compute engines, data systems, coordination services, and governance surfaces so a captain can inspect the shape before reading code.

narrative.title: Shared dependencies are the clearest cross-repo connective tissue.
narrative.body: The demo highlights high-fanout libraries such as jackson-databind, guava, commons-cli, jetty-server, and slf4j-api as navigation anchors across the landscape.

narrative.title: Unknown runtime topology remains visible.
narrative.body: Static evidence can map repositories, manifests, configuration, docs, trackers, and duplicated/debt-prone files. Live deployment, secrets, vendor config, and runtime calls are intentionally marked as unknown here.

components.label: Alluxio
components.summary: Included in the Bigtop release BOM but not an Apache project.

components.label: Apache Oozie
components.summary: Retired project used as a legacy control for lifecycle and evidence-state handling.

components.label: Apache Bigtop
components.summary: Root repository for packaging, deployment, smoke testing, Docker, and component BOM metadata.

components.label: Apache Sqoop
components.summary: Retired project used as a legacy control for replacement and migration signals.

atlas_nodes.label: Apache Bigtop Confluence
atlas_nodes.summary: Official Bigtop wiki space with overview, releases, support matrix, build, deployment, and contribution pages.

atlas_nodes.label: Apache Bigtop JIRA
atlas_nodes.summary: Official Bigtop tracker for bugs and enhancement requests.

atlas_nodes.label: Apache Bigtop mailing lists
atlas_nodes.summary: Official user, developer, commits, CI, announce, and issues mailing lists.

atlas_nodes.label: Bigtop CI and smoke-test jobs
atlas_nodes.summary: Upstream CI is context evidence, not a Portolan verification result.

atlas_nodes.label: Bigtop Docker images
atlas_nodes.summary: Later runtime tests may observe containers locally; the manifest itself remains metadata-only.
